subject: Re: Bigger Than Life
body:
I propose the title as  aspects of the  Theory of General Lifativity with "special" lafitivity being intelligent

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, January 19, 2007 8:54:14 AM
Subject: FW: Bigger Than Life

 


 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 

-----Original Message-----
From: slloyd@MIT.EDU [mailto:slloyd@MIT.EDU] 
Sent: Thursday, January 18, 2007 4:25 PM
To: gmc@harvard.edu; Martin_Nowak@harvard.edu; Lesley Groff
Subject: Bigger Than Life

Dear George, Martin, Jeffrey,
    I only know a few of George's names for the Bigger Than Life
conference (as in, `Generalized life: it's Bigger Than Life'), but the
ones I know seem good.  I'd just like to add a couple of people who have
thought quite a lot about generalized forms of life in computational and
cosmological settings.  These are Charlie Bennett of IBM and Katie
Freese of U. Michigan.  I'll think of some more over the next couple of
days (I'm travelling).
    That was very fun Tuesday and I look forward to more such fun
soon.

Yours,
    Seth






 
____________________________________________________________________________________
